compiled_state.title: RED: Create compliance tests for exploration-decomposition.md protocol
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) after implementation tasks complete
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py
- [ ] Test asserts exploration-decomposition.md exists at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/
  Verify: grep -q "exploration-decomposition" tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py
- [ ] Test asserts protocol contains SINGLE_SOURCE and MULTI_SOURCE classification
  Verify: grep -q "SINGLE_SOURCE\|MULTI_SOURCE" tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py
- [ ] Test asserts protocol contains DECOMPOSE_RECOMMENDED escape hatch
  Verify: grep -q "DECOMPOSE_RECOMMENDED" tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py
- [ ] Test asserts re-decomposition is bounded to 1 level
  Verify: grep -q "bound\|1 level\|one.*level\|max.*1" tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py
- [ ] Test asserts brainstorm SKILL.md references exploration-decomposition.md
  Verify: grep -q "brainstorm" tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py
- [ ] Test asserts fix-bug SKILL.md references exploration-decomposition.md
  Verify: grep -q "fix-bug" tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py
- [ ] Test asserts implementation-plan SKILL.md references exploration-decomposition.md
  Verify: grep -q "implementation-plan" tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py
- [ ] All new tests FAIL (RED) against the current codebase
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py --tb=short -q 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|failed"

## TDD Requirement
Write failing tests that assert the protocol file exists, contains required content, and is referenced by the three key skills. Tests must fail (RED) before the protocol is created.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py (create)
